summary: The batch of synthetic samples covers all intents, difficulties, ambiguities, and noise types, but the style attribute is slightly underrepresented. There are also some near-duplicate phrasings and a few missing attribute combinations.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more informal and fragmented styles to enhance diversity.
Review and refine the generator to reduce near-duplicate phrasings.
Ensure that all combinations of attributes are considered during sample generation.
